auth.cgu_required: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to create an account.
auth.cgu_notice: By creating an account, you confirm that you have read and accepted our legal documents. Version 1.0 — May 12, 2026.

legal.title: Legal documents
legal.subtitle: ImmoBF Africa legal documents — Version 1.0
legal.version: Version 1.0 — Effective: May 12, 2026 — Governing law: Burkina Faso / OHADA / BCEAO

cgu.art1_p1: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the ImmoBF Africa platform. ImmoBF Africa is a digital marketplace connecting property listers and prospective buyers or tenants. The publisher does not act as a real estate agent, broker, or regulated financial intermediary.
cgu.art1_p2: Any use of the platform constitutes full acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.
cgu.art2_li1: "User": any person accessing the platform, whether registered or not.
cgu.art2_li4: "Transaction": any payment initiated via the platform (deposit, escrow, down payment).
cgu.art3_p1: Access is restricted to adults (18 years or older). The User is solely responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential. Any unauthorized use of an account resulting from the User's negligence is the User's sole responsibility.
cgu.art4_li1: Publish accurate, complete, and up-to-date information about the listed properties.
cgu.art4_li2: Be the property owner or hold a valid and verifiable mandate to list the property.
cgu.art4_li3: Not publish fraudulent, misleading, or fictitious listings.
cgu.art4_li4: Not use the platform for unlawful purposes (money laundering, terrorism financing).
cgu.art4_li5: Remove or update any listing whose information has become inaccurate.
cgu.art4_p2: Failure to comply with these obligations is the Lister's sole responsibility and may result in immediate account deletion without compensation.
cgu.art5_li1: Verify the legal status of any property (land title, easements, mortgages) before making any commitment.
cgu.art5_li2: Consult a notary or competent expert before any real estate transaction.
cgu.art5_li3: Not contact Listers for purposes other than acquiring or renting the listed property.
cgu.art6_p1: The platform offers an escrow facility as a convenience. This mechanism does not constitute a bank guarantee under BCEAO regulations. Payments are processed by third-party providers (FedaPay, Orange Money, Moov Money, Wave) whose own terms apply.
cgu.art7_p1: All platform elements are the exclusive property of the publisher and protected under Burkina Faso intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction constitutes infringement.
cgu.art8_p1: These Terms are governed by Burkina Faso law, supplemented by OHADA uniform acts. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso. Contact:

privacy.version: Version 1.0 — May 12, 2026 — Compliant with GDPR principles and UEMOA/BCEAO regulations
privacy.art9_p1: The data controller is ImmoBF Africa. Contact:
privacy.art10_li1: Identification data: name, phone number, email.
privacy.art10_li2: KYC data (professional Listers): copy of identity document.
privacy.art10_li3: Transaction data: amounts, references, logs (retained 10 years — BCEAO obligation).
privacy.art10_li4: Navigation data: IP addresses, technical cookies, access logs.
privacy.art10_li5: Published content: listings, photos, property descriptions.
privacy.art11_li3: Fraud prevention and regulatory compliance (AML/CFT, BCEAO/UEMOA).
privacy.art11_li4: Platform improvement and user experience personalization.
privacy.art12_p1: Account data: active use period + 5 years after last login. Transaction data: 10 years (BCEAO financial traceability obligation).
privacy.art13_intro: You have the following rights, exercisable at
privacy.art13_li1: Right of access to your personal data.
privacy.art13_li2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data.
privacy.art13_li3: Right to erasure (subject to legal retention obligations).
privacy.art13_li4: Right to object to processing for marketing purposes.
privacy.art14_p1: We implement appropriate technical measures: password encryption (Argon2), HTTPS/TLS connections, time-limited authentication tokens, access logging.
privacy.art15_p1: The platform uses only strictly necessary technical cookies. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are placed without your prior consent.

disclaimer.art16_p1: ImmoBF Africa is a digital marketplace. The publisher does not guarantee the quality, accuracy, legality, or authenticity of listings published by Users. Each party must exercise appropriate due diligence — including consulting a notary or surveyor — before any legal or financial commitment.
disclaimer.art17_intro: The publisher disclaims all liability for:
disclaimer.art17_li1: Inaccurate, misleading, or fraudulent information published by Listers.
disclaimer.art17_li2: The actual condition of the property (hidden defects, illegal occupation, land disputes).
disclaimer.art17_li3: Any lack of a valid land title or dispute over property ownership.
disclaimer.art17_li4: Any financial loss suffered without adequate prior verification.
disclaimer.art18_intro: The publisher shall not be liable for:
disclaimer.art18_li1: Any payment failure or delay attributable to third-party providers (FedaPay, Orange Money, Moov, Wave).
disclaimer.art18_li2: Any loss resulting from unauthorized account access due to the User's negligence.
disclaimer.art18_li3: Any discrepancy between amounts displayed and fees charged by mobile money operators.
disclaimer.art18_li4: Any technical interruption or failure of the platform.
disclaimer.art19_intro: The publisher shall not be liable for:
disclaimer.art19_li1: Any breach of trust, scam, or fraud committed by a Lister against a Visitor.
disclaimer.art19_li2: Any failure by a Visitor toward a Lister.
disclaimer.art19_li3: Any dispute arising from an agreement made directly between the parties outside the platform.
disclaimer.art20_p1: To the maximum extent permitted by Burkina Faso law and OHADA texts, the publisher's liability is limited to amounts actually received from the User in the 12 months preceding the event giving rise to the damage.
disclaimer.art21_p1: The publisher is released from liability in the event of force majeure: natural disasters, armed conflicts, telecommunications outages, pandemics, restrictive governmental acts.
disclaimer.art22_p1: Any manifestly unlawful content may be reported to
